exposition_titlescreen2.title: Yarn Ball
exposition_titlescreen2.subtitle: A cute game where you solve puzzles using courage and curiosity!

start.text: Ah hello! Welcome to my domain... what do you think?

choices.text: Looks like a blank canvas to me

sees_nothing.text: Well that's simply because, well... uhh, because there IS nothing! Keen observation skills...

sees_potential.text: Ah, it seems you have a keen eye for potential! That's very good!

exposition_3.text: Ah, that's better... no? What do you think now?

change_worse.text: Oh don't worry, we won't be here long anyways...

change_neutral.text: Wow, that bad huh? Don't worry we won't be here long...

change_better.text: Oh good! That's just a taste of what's yet to come though...

choices.text: Wait... ready for what? I'm confused?

exposition_end_1.text: Naturally! All will be revealed in due time, but for now, I can share with you this: The intention of this experiment is to help you understand yourself better.

exposition_end_2.text: The intention of this experiment is to help you understand yourself better. I can already tell your eagerness will carry you very far in this experience.

exposition_end_3.text: I ask you to answer the questions in this game how you would answer them if being asked in a real life situation. Play as yourself, and I'll help you learn a lot about yourself at the end, but only if you trust me...

final_1.text: Alright. I believe you are ready. Let's begin, for real this time...

final_2.text: I understand. That's probably smartest. I hope with time you will come to realize my intentions are genuine. For now though, let's proceed...

final_3.text: ...well you're still here, so that must mean you want to find out what happens next... let's find out together, shall we?

final_4.text: *You wake from a long, exhausted nap* So tired... ugh... and such a weird dream too... what was all that about??? I wonder who that voice I was speaking to was... ah whatever, I'm too hungry to think right now...
